response.justification: Bogdan meets the minimum requirement of 15 years of software engineering experience and possesses a strong entrepreneurial spirit as a founder. However, his profile aligns more closely with a Senior or Staff Full-Stack Engineer rather than a Director-level Principal AI Strategist. He lacks the deep, recognized expertise in artificial intelligence and the enterprise-level strategic advisory experience required to drive AI differentiation at this level.
strengths: Meets the 15+ years of software engineering experience requirement with a highly diverse technical background.
Strong entrepreneurial and builder mindset, evidenced by founding GISCollective and maintaining open-source tools.
Demonstrated ability to inspire and educate others through technical workshops, conference talks, and community involvement.
concerns: Lacks the Director-level strategic leadership and cross-organizational influence expected of a Principal Engineer.
AI and machine learning experience appears very recent and lacks the depth of a recognized industry expert.
No evident experience advising strategic enterprise customers and partners on cutting-edge cloud and AI technologies.
